name: taskcompleted-with-receipt
doc: The passing variant of the receipt gate. Same modified code file, but a PostToolUse Bash `bun test` (exit 0, 0 fail) is captured as a fresh passing receipt (handle-post.ts:38-42 captureReceipt → tracking/receipts.ts:95-100), so TaskCompleted returns "" (completion allowed). Unit parity: test/task-completed.test.ts:38-46. The receipt lives in trackFile(sid, defaultStateDir(cwd)) and the TaskCompleted gate reads the SAME path (task-completed.ts:43) — HOME+cwd must be stable across the three spawns.

steps.doc: PostToolUse Write → modifiedFiles (SNIPER reminder proves it).

PostToolUse Bash `bun test` with a passing tool_result → classifyReceipt kind=test, exit 0, pass 3 fail 0 (receipts.ts:54-61 TEST_RE + parseCounts) → captured as a passing receipt. The Bash post path emits nothing itself (empty stdout).
TaskCompleted now finds a fresh passing receipt (window = TTL×5, task-completed.ts:42) → receiptGate returns null → validateTaskSolid returns "" → completion passes.
